title: Amtech S4000 Artist Paint Brush Set for Acrylic, Oil, Model, Kids and Canvas Painting, 15 Assorted sizes for Fine Art Enthusiasts, Hobbyists, and Ceramic Crafts
features: 15 DIFFERENT BRUSHES: Includes an assortment of brush sizes, including flat and round-tipped paint brushes with colour-coded handles for a wide range of paint applications and finishes.
SUITABLE FOR DIFFERENT PAINTS: This art brush set is ideal for all with sorts of paints, including watercolours, oil paints and acrylics
ALL TYPES OF ART PROJECTS: Ideal for all types of arts and crafts projects, including painting canvasses, ceramics and miniature models
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
description: Product Description Express your creativity with the Amtech Artist brush set. You can use these paint brushes for both acrylic and oil-based paints, as well as, delicate watercolours. The colour-coded combination of flat and round-tipped brushes, makes this 15-piece set, ideal for fine art enthusiasts, hobbyists, miniature model makers and ceramic arts and crafts. Also suitable for children, who like activity paint. Amtech has a fantastic range of essential tools for all your hobby and craft requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3-year product guarantee. So, keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x 15pc Art Brush Set See more
